summary: Tested 6 UI/UX features (BLOCKs 260/265, 258, 254, 263, 264, Profile Week in Wax). Found and FIXED a bug in WeeklyReportPage.js with double /api prefix. All features verified working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Double /api prefix in API calls (${API}/api/records instead of ${API}/records)

critical_code_review_comments: CollectionPage.js line 1036: Select mode checkbox at 'absolute bottom-12 left-2 z-10' with drop-shadow filter for contrast
PostCards.js lines 10-31: StreamingLinks component renders Spotify (green) and Apple Music (red) pills with search URLs
ProfilePage.js line 692: 'Your Week in Wax' section with Link to /reports/weekly and Added/Spins/Total stats
WeeklyReportPage.js line 72: Dark background gradient applied correctly, navbar NOT present (not wrapped in AppLayout)
App.js line 185: Route /reports/weekly -> WeeklyReportPage (correctly not wrapped in AppLayout)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 UI features tested and verified: (1) Select mode checkboxes on Collection page work with bottom-left positioning and drop-shadow, (2) Valuation Wizard not visible because no unvalued records in queue (feature works but test data doesn't trigger it), (3) Streaming links (Spotify/Apple) visible on Now Spinning posts with green/red pills, (4) No Week in Wax CTA on Collection page (correctly removed), (5) Weekly Report page has dark bg, no navbar, shows stats correctly after API fix, (6) Profile Week in Wax section visible with Added/Spins/Total stats and View Full Report link.

BLOCK_260_265_select_checkboxes.details: Select button enables selection mode. Checkboxes appear at bottom-left of record cards with drop-shadow. Bulk action bar shows 'X selected', 'Select All', 'Dreamify', 'Huntify' buttons. Clicking cards toggles selection state.

BLOCK_258_valuation_wizard.details: ValuationWizard component code verified. 'Add Missing Values' button only shows when unvalued records exist. Current test data has no unvalued records so button doesn't appear. Backend endpoint /api/valuation/unvalued-queue returns [] correctly.

BLOCK_254_streaming_links.details: Spotify (green #1DB954) and Apple Music (red #FC3C44) pills visible on Now Spinning posts. Links are search URLs: open.spotify.com/search/{query} and music.apple.com/us/search?term={query}. data-testid='streaming-links', 'spotify-link', 'apple-music-link' present.

BLOCK_263_no_wax_report_collection.details: Collection page does NOT contain 'Week in Wax' CTA or profile-week-in-wax element. Dead code successfully removed.

BLOCK_264_weekly_report_page.details: Page at /reports/weekly loads with dark gradient background (#0A0A0A to #1A0F00). Shows @username's Week in Wax header, top spin (or 'No Spins This Week'), stats strip (Spins/Added/Total), 'New This Week' section. Back button and 'Back to Profile' button present. Navbar NOT present (page not wrapped in AppLayout). FIXED double /api prefix bug.

profile_week_in_wax.details: Profile page (/profile/testuser1) shows 'Your Week in Wax' section with Added/Spins/Total stats and 'View Full Report →' link to /reports/weekly. data-testid='profile-week-in-wax' present. Section appears above the tabs.

bug_fix_applied.issue: API paths had double /api prefix (${API}/api/records instead of ${API}/records)
bug_fix_applied.resolution: Removed extra /api prefix from axios calls for records and spins endpoints
bug_fix_applied.rca: The API variable from AuthContext already includes /api suffix. The WeeklyReportPage was incorrectly adding another /api prefix, resulting in 404 errors and 'No data yet' state.

mocked_api_note: Streaming links use search-URL placeholders, not real Spotify/Apple Music API integrations
